segments.text: This boomerang follow-up is incredibly strong!
segments.original_text: このブーメランからブーメラン非常に強力です

segments.text: And the return boomerang was handled perfectly too!
segments.original_text: そして戻りブーメランもケアしたよくすまして

full_text: One more! This boomerang follow-up is incredibly strong! And the return boomerang was handled perfectly too! And then—
